source: Codex local release readiness check on 2026-07-01; no GitHub, Cloudflare, EAS, Neon, Sentry, or Slack secret store proof was written to this file

DATABASE_URL.note: Runtime Postgres URL must be verified without committing the URL.

STAGING_DATABASE_URL.note: Staging Postgres URL must be verified without committing the URL.

NEON_API_KEY.note: Neon management token must be verified without committing the token.

NEON_PROJECT_ID.note: Project identity must match the Salary Hijacking Neon project.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.note: Cloudflare deployment token must be verified without committing the token.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.note: Cloudflare account ID must match the Salary Hijacking release account.

CF_ADMIN_WORKER_NAME.note: Admin Worker name must remain salary-hijacking-admin.

EXPO_TOKEN.note: EAS token must be verified without committing the token.

EAS_PROJECT_ID.note: EAS project ID must match the Salary Hijacking mobile app.

GITHUB_TOKEN.note: GitHub token should be supplied by GitHub Actions or an approved out-of-band operator token.

SENTRY_DSN.note: Sentry DSN must be verified without committing the DSN.

SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL.note: Slack webhook URL must be verified without committing the webhook URL.

nextEvidenceRequired: GitHub Environment or repository secret presence proof for CI, deploy, mobile, and release workflows
Cloudflare Worker secret presence proof for API, notifications, scheduler, and admin runtime
EAS project and EXPO_TOKEN presence proof for native mobile builds
Neon project secret mapping proof for DATABASE_URL and STAGING_DATABASE_URL
Sentry and Slack integration presence proof or an explicit documented release decision to disable them
